message: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds (https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.11/color-contrast?application=axeAPI)
selector: html > body > div > nav > div:nth-child(1) > ul > li:nth-child(21) > a > span:nth-child(1)

runnerExtras.description: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA minimum contrast ratio thresholds
